programme.title: Shepherds Around The World
programme.desc: People Mark Michel and his team embark on a global journey, immersing themselves in the lives of five diverse pastoral communities to explore their unique cultures, challenges, and enduring traditions.

programme.title: Four Seasons In The Forests
programme.desc: Nature Different creatures interact with nature; some appear and others hide each season, providing variety in the forest.

programme.title: The Battle For Survival In The Mediterranean
programme.desc: Nature Despite the dangers and threats to which marine creatures are exposed daily in the Mediterranean Sea due to factory and farm waste, these creatures struggle to survive through adaptation and biological evolution.

programme.title: In Love With Wild Horses
programme.desc: People An amazing journey through the enchanting nature of the North American continent, home to the Tsoulcotine people, known as the horse people because of their timeless and unique bond with horses.

programme.title: A Journey With The Oud
programme.desc: Musical Comedy The history of the Oud in the old civilizations is glorious and it had various shapes that were used by musicians and inspired lots of people to create new musical instruments.

programme.title: Arabic Radio
programme.desc: History Delving into the history of Arab radio, highlighting its role in conveying the voice of the people, shaping their consciousness, and expressing their revolutions and demands. It also presents the role of radio in communication and preserving the heritage and art of the diverse Arab peoples.

programme.title: The Diabetes Battle In Australia
programme.desc: Fitness & Health An Australian physician and a physiologist are revolutionizing the world of diseases by presenting a scientifically based diet that can eliminate type 2 diabetes.

programme.title: Our Angry Land
programme.desc: Nature Showcasing the scale of devastation and destruction that can result from natural disasters such as hurricanes, floods, volcanoes, earthquakes, and wildfires, highlighting the consequences of these events and their direct impact on human life and the continuity of societies.

programme.title: Protecting Sondong Cave
programme.desc: Nature A journey into the heart of Phong Nha-Ke Bang cave, located in northern Vietnam and listed as a UNESCO World Heritage Site. This cave, the largest in the world, is an extraordinary marvel, featuring a lake, forest, clouds, and a rare ecosystem.

programme.title: This Is Africa
programme.desc: Nature.

programme.title: Cheese From The Heart Of Nature
programme.desc: Nature Cheese makers strive to preserve the traditional flavor threatened by modern industry, passing down their age-old secrets through generations, believing that authentic taste is crafted by patient, loving hands, not machines.

programme.title: A Mosque's Story
programme.desc: History We travel through the mosques of the world to learn their untold stories, contemplate their designs and decorations, and explore through them the cultural and social transformations that they have witnessed over time.

programme.title: Crescent In The Face Of Nazism
programme.desc: History During the Nazi invasion of France, hundreds of Jews found refuge in the Grand Mosque of Paris and other Islamic institutions, where Muslims bravely risked their lives to shield them from capture and death.

programme.title: Arab Digital Community
programme.desc: Sciences Examines the impact of digital content on Arab society by following top content creators and how they shape the audience's awareness, questions, and values.

programme.desc: Nature An exciting and enjoyable exploratory adventure in one of the strangest places in the world: Mount Olympus, once the home of the gods in Greek mythology. Now, scientists are working tirelessly to understand its strange phenomena.

programme.title: Santorini's Mystery
programme.desc: Nature Researchers from around the globe embark on a high-stakes mission to investigate the volatile volcano of Santorini, plunging beneath the sea to gather evidence and unravel questions that have intrigued historians and scientists for decades.

programme.title: Cheese From The Heart Of Nature
programme.desc: Nature Cheese makers strive to preserve the traditional flavor threatened by modern industry, passing down their age-old secrets through generations, believing that authentic taste is crafted by patient, loving hands, not machines.

programme.title: A Mosque's Story
programme.desc: History We travel through the mosques of the world to learn their untold stories, contemplate their designs and decorations, and explore through them the cultural and social transformations that they have witnessed over time.

programme.title: Crescent In The Face Of Nazism
programme.desc: History During the Nazi invasion of France, hundreds of Jews found refuge in the Grand Mosque of Paris and other Islamic institutions, where Muslims bravely risked their lives to shield them from capture and death.

programme.title: Arab Digital Community
programme.desc: Sciences Examines the impact of digital content on Arab society by following top content creators and how they shape the audience's awareness, questions, and values.

programme.title: The Impossible Journey
programme.desc: Nature In the heart of the icy wilderness, 28 brave adventurers battle for survival after being stranded. Tim Jarvis revives their impossible journey in a legendary challenge.

programme.title: The Impossible Journey
programme.desc: Nature In the heart of the icy wilderness, 28 brave adventurers battle for survival after being stranded. Tim Jarvis revives their impossible journey in a legendary challenge.

programme.title: Tahtaci People.. Children Of Forest
programme.desc: Nature In the Aegean forests in southern Turkey, a strange sect of loggers performs special rituals when cutting trees in season, where they pray and offer sacrifices because they believe that each tree has its own spirit.

programme.title: Secrets Deep In The Ice
programme.desc: Nature Scientists embark on a journey to the coldest and most frozen places, where they uncover mummified bodies, lost treasures, and mysterious viruses beneath layers of ice, using state-of-the-art tools and technologies that give us glimpses into the past.

programme.title: Crescent In The Face Of Nazism
programme.desc: History During the Nazi invasion of France, hundreds of Jews found refuge in the Grand Mosque of Paris and other Islamic institutions, where Muslims bravely risked their lives to shield them from capture and death.

programme.title: Opposite Direction
programme.desc: Debate Heated discussions on various political, social, and religious topics, in a debate that brings together two new guests representing two different trends with opposing opinions on a given topic. Faisal Al Qasem.

programme.desc: Determined to fulfill her mother's dream of a better life, a young woman faces numerous trials and personal loss, only to have her journey further complicated by a man she meets along the way. Hiba Nawab, Krushal Ahuja.

programme.title: Har Dil Jo Pyar Karega
programme.desc: Pooja's family decides to marry her off to Raj; however, Raj discovers that he has fallen for Pooja's best friend. Raj Kanwar, Rumi Jaffery, Preity Zinta, Rani Mukerji.

programme.title: Kalank
programme.desc: A story of six inscrutable people who try to reach for love but the dichotomy of Husnabad, which is a town in North India gets them separated instead. Alia Bhatt, Sonakshi Sinha, Aditya Roy Kapoor, Varun Dhawan, Madhuri Dixit, Abhishek Varman, Shibani Bathija.

programme.title: Namastey London
programme.desc: A pretty and civilized girl is forced to leave London and to go to India to marry a Punjabi farmer. After the marriage, she tells her husband that she isn't in love with him and goes back to London. Later on, he follows her to gain her love. Katrina Kaif, Rishi Kapoor, Vipul Amrutlal Shah, Suresh Nair.

programme.title: Namaste England
programme.desc: Consumed by the dream of immigrating to London, an Indian couple does whatever it takes to make it happen. Parineeti Chopra, Arjun Kapoor, Alankrita Sahai, Satish Kaushik, Atul Sharma, Vipul Amrutlal Shah, Suresh Nair, Ritesh Shah.

programme.title: Ribbon
programme.desc: A young married couple finds themselves facing an unplanned pregnancy and with time they realize that parenthood is a hard mission. Kalki Koechlin, Sumeet Vyas, Pathy Aiyar, Hempushpak Arora, Priyanka Basu, Rahil Bhardwaj, Rakhee Sandilya, Rajeev Upadhyay.

programme.title: Ribbon
programme.desc: A young married couple finds themselves facing an unplanned pregnancy and with time they realize that parenthood is a hard mission. Kalki Koechlin, Sumeet Vyas, Pathy Aiyar, Hempushpak Arora, Priyanka Basu, Rahil Bhardwaj, Rakhee Sandilya, Rajeev Upadhyay.

programme.title: The Empire Of Ms
programme.desc: When Mokhtar becomes a single father after his wife's passing, his efforts to raise their six children lead to unexpected challenges as they keep arguing together about what's right and what's wrong. Khaled Al Nabawy, Hala Shiha.

programme.title: Our Father's House
programme.desc: Two divorced sisters live with their children at their father's house, where they face many problems because of their failure in raising their children. Hayat Al Fahad, Soad Abd Allah.

programme.title: Crystal
programme.desc: A severe conflict arises between Alia, a famous fashion designer, and Fay, the daughter of her house guard, who is trying to become like her. It gets worse when they both love the same person, Dr. Jawad. Mahmoud Nasr, Bamila Alkik, Stephanie Atala, Khaled Shabbat, Leen Gherra, Hakan Arslan, Lobna Meshlah, Pamela El kik.

programme.title: Complex 75
programme.desc: Relationships become intertwined between five families who live inside one of the upscale residential complexes in the city of Riyadh, and their dreams and ambitions control them, which may cause them problems. Tamer Bsyony, Ghada Al Molla, Abd El Monaem Riyad, Ingy Salama, Sarah El Harbi, Nada Ibrahim, Rana Gobran, Ghada Al Mulla, Rana Jobran.

programme.title: Lost In Someone's Love
programme.desc: Sai Joshi dreams of joining the Nagpur Medical College and becoming a doctor one day, but her steps are hindered when her family forces her to marry an IPS officer who is in love with another woman, so they make a secret deal that comforts both of them. Ayesha Singh, Neil Bhatt, Aishwarya Sharma Bhatt, Sanjivani Amit Takkar, Kishori Shahane, Jaydeep Sen, Rajesh Chawla.

programme.title: The Strong Ones
programme.desc: Known as Al Atawala, Nassar, his brother Khedr, and their gang thrive on theft, exploiting Nassar's skill in safe cracking. Nonetheless, their brotherly unity slowly weakens as they become entangled with dangerous crime bosses. Ahmed El Sakka, Tareq Lotfy, Bassem Samra, Mai Kassab, Hanaan Youssef, Salah Abdullah, Ahmed Khaled Moussa, Hisham Helal, Basem Samra, May Kassab, Noha Abdeen, Farida Seif Al Nasr, Salah Abdallah, Ahmed Khaled Mousa.

programme.title: The Pit
programme.desc: Despite leaving his love behind and starting fresh, the surprising presence of Yamac's mother disturbs all of his feelings asking him to return and aid the family legacy. Aras Bulut Iynemli, Erkan Kolcak Kostendil.

programme.title: Bahar
programme.desc: After surviving a serious illness, Bahar, a devoted wife, finds herself facing a series of personal setbacks. With her marriage falling apart, she chooses to reclaim control of her life by returning to the medical career she once left behind. Demet Evgar, Mehmet Yilmaz Ak, Bugra Gülsoy, Ecem Özkaya, Füsun Demirel, Bugra Gulsoy, Ecem Ozkaya, Fusun Demirel, Elit Andac Cam, Demirhan Demircioglu, Neslihan Yesilyurt, Ayca Uzum.

programme.title: Tambourines
programme.desc: Complex confrontations and interrelated relationships between members of a folk art group for women and another for men. Mounir Al Zaaby, Hamad Al Roomi, Huda Hussien, Ebrahim Alhasawi, Khaled Albriky, Shima`a Aly, Rawan Mahdi, Huda Hussain, Ibrahim Alhasawi.

programme.title: Surrogate Mother
programme.desc: When the Iraqi family discovers that their daughter-in-law is not having children, they begin to consider hiring another woman as a surrogate mother. Hend Kamel, Adel Abbas, Zohour Alaa, Alexander Uloom, Joumanah Kareem, Nada Emad Khalil, David Oryan, Hind Kamel, Hind Kamil.

programme.title: My Family Wins
programme.desc: In each episode, Jawad Al Shakarchi hosts two families competing to answer a series of general knowledge questions to win the grand prize of ten million Iraqi dinars. Jawad Al Shakraji, Fadi Hadad, Haider Nashi, Jawad Al Shakarchi, Fadi Haddad, Jawad Al Shakarji.

programme.title: September Breezes
programme.desc: Roula returns to her home in a rural Syrian village, where her grandmother, Umm Fawaz, still lives. Unexpected events force her to stay longer than she thought, and her life converges with youth and the elderly in her village. Sabah Jazairi, Nadeen Tahseen baik.

programme.title: Al Maddah: The Legend Of The End
programme.desc: Facing Sameeh, the demon of the underworld, Saber Al Maddah fights his hardest battle yet, having given up his powers for love, leaving faith as his last hope to secure the victory of good. Hamada Helal, Ghada Adel.

programme.title: Wild Heart
programme.desc: Kidnapped from his wealthy family as a child, Yaman grows up on the streets, forming close bonds along the way. Years later, he's reunited with his biological family but struggles to adjust to a life of privilege he no longer remembers. Halit Özgür Sari, Yurdaer Okur, Dolunay Soysert, Bertan Asllani, Cagatay Tosun, Hilal Yildiz, Halit Ozgur Sari, Simay Barlas.

programme.title: The Family
programme.desc: Not only does coincidence bring together the mysterious businessman Aslan and psychotherapist Devin, but they also share the same psychological traumas caused by their families. Therefore, they try to establish a life together despite the suffering. Kivanç Tatlitug, Serenay Sarikaya, Nur Surer, Nejat Isler, Canan Erguder, Ahmet Katiksiz, Hakan Bonomo, Kivanc Tatlitug.

programme.title: Al Maddah: The Legend Of The End
programme.desc: Facing Sameeh, the demon of the underworld, Saber Al Maddah fights his hardest battle yet, having given up his powers for love, leaving faith as his last hope to secure the victory of good. Hamada Helal, Ghada Adel.

programme.title: Tambourines
programme.desc: Complex confrontations and interrelated relationships between members of a folk art group for women and another for men. Mounir Al Zaaby, Hamad Al Roomi, Huda Hussien, Ebrahim Alhasawi, Khaled Albriky, Shima`a Aly, Rawan Mahdi, Huda Hussain, Ibrahim Alhasawi.

programme.title: Wild Heart
programme.desc: Kidnapped from his wealthy family as a child, Yaman grows up on the streets, forming close bonds along the way. Years later, he's reunited with his biological family but struggles to adjust to a life of privilege he no longer remembers. Halit Özgür Sari, Yurdaer Okur, Dolunay Soysert, Bertan Asllani, Cagatay Tosun, Hilal Yildiz, Halit Ozgur Sari, Simay Barlas.

programme.title: The Family
programme.desc: Not only does coincidence bring together the mysterious businessman Aslan and psychotherapist Devin, but they also share the same psychological traumas caused by their families. Therefore, they try to establish a life together despite the suffering. Kivanç Tatlitug, Serenay Sarikaya, Nur Surer, Nejat Isler, Canan Erguder, Ahmet Katiksiz, Hakan Bonomo, Kivanc Tatlitug.

programme.title: My Family Wins
programme.desc: In each episode, Jawad Al Shakarchi hosts two families competing to answer a series of general knowledge questions to win the grand prize of ten million Iraqi dinars. Jawad Al Shakraji, Fadi Hadad, Haider Nashi, Jawad Al Shakarchi, Fadi Haddad, Jawad Al Shakarji.

programme.title: Surrogate Mother
programme.desc: When the Iraqi family discovers that their daughter-in-law is not having children, they begin to consider hiring another woman as a surrogate mother. Hend Kamel, Adel Abbas, Zohour Alaa, Alexander Uloom, Joumanah Kareem, Nada Emad Khalil, David Oryan, Hind Kamel, Hind Kamil.

programme.title: Top Chef
programme.desc: In this Arabic version of the reality show, 17 chefs from 11 Arab countries compete in fiery culinary challenges under the supervision of prominent Arab chefs and international guests. Bobby Chinn, Mona Mously, Maroun Chedid, Mona Mosly.

programme.title: Tash: The Return
programme.desc: duo Nasser Al Gassabi and Abdullah Al Sadhan return in a new version of the series to discuss more issues of Saudi society. Nasser Al Qasabi, Abd Allah Al Sahdan.

programme.title: Al Maddah: The Legend Of The End
programme.desc: Facing Sameeh, the demon of the underworld, Saber Al Maddah fights his hardest battle yet, having given up his powers for love, leaving faith as his last hope to secure the victory of good. Hamada Helal, Ghada Adel.

programme.title: Our Club
programme.desc: Debate An interactive space where fans share their passion for Saudi football by discussing league matches, talking about their favorite clubs, and exploring the history and meaning of championships. Abd Al Rahman Al Hamidy.

programme.title: Wild Heart
programme.desc: Kidnapped from his wealthy family as a child, Yaman grows up on the streets, forming close bonds along the way. Years later, he's reunited with his biological family but struggles to adjust to a life of privilege he no longer remembers. Halit Özgür Sari, Yurdaer Okur, Dolunay Soysert, Bertan Asllani, Cagatay Tosun, Hilal Yildiz, Halit Ozgur Sari, Simay Barlas.

programme.desc: Debate Shining a light on individuals devoted to serving their communities through remarkable humanitarian efforts, honoring these heroes who exemplify generosity and commitment while sharing their inspiring stories with gratitude.

programme.title: The Funny Side
programme.desc: Khasha'a and Nasha'a's well intentioned antics trigger a chain of hilarious mishaps, creating one problem after another for everyone in the neighborhood. Ehsan Dadosh, Alaa Hussien.

programme.title: 'Ozobi Al Salemia
programme.desc: Due to his extravagance and recklessness, Helal Hajji accumulates debts and is chased by debtors. But he falls in love with the rich girl, Amira, who he later discovers is his friend's fiancée. Abd Al Hussein Abd Al Reda , Soad AbdAllah, Mohamed Al Mansour, Mohamed Gaber, Saleh Hamad, Faisal El Dahy, Ahmed Abd El Halim, Abd Al Hussein Abd Al Reda , Abd Al Hussein Abd Al Reda, Soad Abd Allah.

programme.title: The Castle
programme.desc: Show In Riyadh, the contestants face tremendous challenges to destroy the castle and win the game. Mohamed Henidy, Mohamad Henedy.

programme.title: Top Chef
programme.desc: In this Arabic version of the reality show, 17 chefs from 11 Arab countries compete in fiery culinary challenges under the supervision of prominent Arab chefs and international guests. Bobby Chinn, Mona Mously, Maroun Chedid, Mona Mosly.

programme.desc: S1 E14 تستمر محاولات فاطيمة للوصول إلى قلب حسن، فيما تشعر سلمى بالانجذاب نحو باسم الذي أقنعها ببراءتها من جريمة مقتل زوجها وتسليم نفسها للشرطة.
programme.title: الحلال الموس

programme.desc: S1 E15 يرفض باسم الرجوع إلى بيت والدته بعد شجاره مع زوجها أنس. أما نرجس، فتواصل بحثها عن أنس. تكتشف الشرطة مكان سلمى وعز وقيام زيكو بخطف عز وعلاقة ماجد بذلك.
programme.title: الحلال الموس

programme.desc: S1 E1 كوم امبو.
programme.title: مسرح مصر الموس

programme.desc: S1 E25 يعجز مختار عن السيطرة على تصرفات لبنى. تكتشف إش إش هوية من أمر بإيذائها. تزور شادية كباريه بوشكاش لتكلفه بمهمة خاصة.
programme.title: إش إش موس

programme.desc: S1 E26 تزور لبنى إخلاص من جديد، لكن لن يمر كلامها هذه المرة مرور الكرام. تتلقى شادية صفعة جديدة. يدبر عبد العاطي حيلة ليحمي رأسه.\r.
programme.title: إش إش موس

programme.desc: S1 E27 تحذر إش إش رجب من عبد العاطي واسماعيل. فيما يغفو الجميع، يقع شجار كبير بين مختار ولبنى بسبب إش إش.\r.
programme.title: إش إش موس

programme.desc: S1 E28 تضع شادية نفسها في موقف محرج أمام إش إش. تزور لبنى إخلاص ومعها \"حقيبة العار\". تسارع إش إش الوقت لإنقاذ رجب من الوقوع في قبضة معتصم.\r.
programme.title: إش إش موس

programme.desc: S2026 E172 برنامج صباحي يتم تقديمه في إطار جذاب يهتم بكل ألوان الحياة في مصر حيث يعرض آخر الأخبار ويسلط الضوء على السلبيات الموجودة في المجتمع المصري للمساعدة في حلها.
programme.title: صباحك مصري

programme.desc: S1 E11 يحاول أنس التقرب من سلمى وفي الوقت ذاته يصر على الزواج من دهبية التي غيرت رأيها بخصوص الرجوع إلى رأفت. من ناحية ثانية، يتذرع أنس أمام نرجس بالشرطة ليبرر نقل ملكية البيت والحمام إلى اسمه.
programme.title: الحلال الموس

programme.desc: S1 E12 يقوم رجال ماجد باشا بتعذيب عز ليعترف بمكان النقود التي سرقها من آدم. من ناحية ثانية، تتزوج دهبية أخيراً من الحاج أنس ولكن سراً.
programme.title: الحلال الموس

programme.desc: S1 E13 يفاجئ أنس دهبية بالسفر إلى لبنان لقضاء شهر العسل في حين تعتقد نرجس بأنه ترك المنزل غاضباً بسبب شكها به. يتفق عز مع زيكو على إطلاق سراحه من أجل البحث عن رشاد.
programme.title: الحلال الموس

programme.desc: S1 E14 تستمر محاولات فاطيمة للوصول إلى قلب حسن، فيما تشعر سلمى بالانجذاب نحو باسم الذي أقنعها ببراءتها من جريمة مقتل زوجها وتسليم نفسها للشرطة.
programme.title: الحلال الموس

programme.title: Battle Of Heer
programme.desc: A gentle-hearted woman is married into the formidable Atwal family, where she endures constant adversity until an unexpected ally gives her the courage to reshape her destiny. Tanisha Mehta, Avinesh Rekhi, Monica Khanna, Narinder Singh, Jaideep Singh, Archana Chawla, Amar Varpe, Akash Deep, Koel Chaudhuri.

programme.title: Mumbai's Bride
programme.desc: Neha struggles with being a single parent of a diabetic kid, but life provides her a second opportunity when a kind young man who would sacrifice anything for her shows up. Shreyas Talpade, Prarthana Behere.

programme.title: Everyone Feels Scared
programme.desc: In every episode, Bipasha Basu meets people haunted by ghosts, cursed objects, and unexplained phenomena, revealing the darkest side of the supernatural. Shweta Basu Prasad, Vikas Sethi.

programme.title: Organic Love Stories
programme.desc: Four women face endless challenges in their romantic relationships, all trying to reach the altar with minimum complications. Ceyda Kasabali, Serah Henesey, Onur Özaydin, Burak Turker, Asli Sahin, Alpgiray M. Ugurlu, Alpgiray M. Ugurlu.

programme.title: Talaash: The Answer Lies Within
programme.desc: Inspector Surjan is torn between his investigations of the high profile murder case, his missing son and Rosie, the prostitute who helped him find clues. He soon discovers that Rosie has been the mistress of the deceased. Aamir Khan, Kareena Kapoor, Rani Mukerji, Nawazuddin Siddiqui, Rajkummar Rao, Reema Kagti, Farhan Akhtar.

programme.title: Taish
programme.desc: A wedding turns into a battlefield due to a series of violent incidents with the disclosure of a secret of a betrayal. Jim Sarbh, Harshvardhan Rane, Kriti Kharbanda, Pulkit Samrat, Sanjeeda Sheikh, Bejoy Nambiar, Bejoy Nambiar.

programme.title: Organic Love Stories
programme.desc: Four women face endless challenges in their romantic relationships, all trying to reach the altar with minimum complications. Ceyda Kasabali, Serah Henesey, Onur Özaydin, Burak Turker, Asli Sahin, Alpgiray M. Ugurlu, Alpgiray M. Ugurlu.

programme.title: Dabangg 2
programme.desc: Chulbul is fighting for revealing the ugly truth of the evil idiot, Baccha Bhaiyaa who is now a politician and a strong rival in the upcoming elections. Sonakshi Sinha, Salman Khan, Prakash Raj, Vinod Khanna, Arbaaz Khan, Dilip Shukla, Arbaaz Khan.
